ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of Accademia degli Unanimi in Salo`, with nickname Il Tolerante, and among the nine founders of Accademia Veneziana. See his biography by Germana Ernst, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
